kundli.sectionSubtitle: Enter birth details or choose a saved profile below.

hero.title: Your Kundli
hero.subtitle: Create your birth chart and discover personalized astrological insights based on Vedic astrology.
hero.subtitle2: Enter your birth details once, save your profile, and access your kundli anytime. Get kundli for yourself or for family members.

whatIs.title: What is a Kundli?
whatIs.p1: A Kundli (also called Janam Kundli or birth chart) is a map of the sky at the exact moment you were born. It shows the positions of the sun, moon, and planets in the 12 zodiac signs and 12 houses.
whatIs.p2: In Vedic astrology, your kundli is used to understand your personality, strengths, challenges, career potential, relationships, and life path. The more accurate your birth details—especially date, time, and place—the more precise your chart and insights.
whatIs.p3: At AnantAstro you can create and save multiple kundli profiles (for yourself and family), so you can revisit your chart and get personalized reports whenever you need.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: Four simple steps to get your kundli and start exploring your astrological profile.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Provide name, date, time, and place of birth for accurate chart calculation.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Your kundli profile is saved so you can access it anytime.
howItWorks.step3Desc: View your birth chart and personalized astrological insights.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Discover personality, career, relationships, and life path guidance.

whyDetails.title: Why birth details matter
whyDetails.subtitle: Accuracy of your kundli depends on the precision of the birth data you provide.
whyDetails.dateDesc: Determines your sun sign and the position of planets at birth.
whyDetails.timeDesc: Essential for accurate moon sign, ascendant, and house divisions.
whyDetails.placeDesc: Used to calculate the exact longitude and latitude for your chart.

whatYouGet.title: What you get
whatYouGet.subtitle: Your kundli unlocks a range of astrological insights and reports.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Common questions about kundli and birth details.
faq.q1: Why is time of birth important?
faq.a1: The exact time determines your moon sign, ascendant (Lagna), and the division of houses in your chart. Even a few minutes can change the result.
faq.q2: Can I get kundli for family members?
faq.a2: Yes. Use "Get for someone else" to add birth details for family or friends and generate their kundli.
faq.a3: Your birth details and kundli profiles are stored securely and only accessible to you when logged in.

finalCta.title: Ready to explore your chart?
finalCta.subtitle: Scroll up to enter birth details or select a profile and get your kundli. Kundli generation uses coins based on current pricing.

hero.title: Matchmaking
hero.subtitle: Ashtakoot (36-point) Gun Milan for marriage compatibility based on Vedic astrology.
hero.subtitle2: Enter birth details for both partners or use saved kundli profiles. Get an instant compatibility score and koota breakdown.

whatIs.title: What is Gun Milan?
whatIs.p1: Gun Milan (also called Ashtakoot Milan) is a traditional Vedic astrology method used to assess marriage compatibility. It compares the birth charts of two people across eight factors, or kootas, that together add up to 36 points.
whatIs.p2: The eight kootas are Varna, Vashya, Tara, Yoni, Graha Maitri, Gana, Bhakoot, and Nadi. Each evaluates a different aspect—from mental compatibility and temperament to health and progeny. A score of 18 or more out of 36 is generally considered acceptable; higher scores indicate a better match.
whatIs.p3: At AnantAstro you can get your Gun Milan result in seconds by entering birth details for both partners or by selecting from your saved kundli profiles.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: Four simple steps to get your matchmaking result.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Add name, date, time, and place of birth for Partner 1 and Partner 2. Use saved kundli profiles for a quick fill.
howItWorks.step2Desc: We run Ashtakoot (8 kootas, 36 gunas) matching using Vedic astrology rules.
howItWorks.step3Desc: See total score, interpretation, and a breakdown of each koota (Varna, Vashya, Tara, Yoni, and more).
howItWorks.step4Desc: Learn how your nakshatras, rashis, and other factors align for marriage compatibility.

whyDetails.title: Why birth details matter
whyDetails.subtitle: Accuracy of your Gun Milan result depends on precise birth data for both partners.
whyDetails.dateDesc: Determines sun sign and planetary positions at birth for both partners.
whyDetails.timeDesc: Essential for accurate moon sign, nakshatra, and ascendant—critical for gun milan.
whyDetails.placeDesc: Used to compute exact longitude and latitude for correct chart calculation.

whatYouGet.title: What you get
whatYouGet.subtitle: Your matchmaking report includes the following.
whatYouGet.item1: Ashtakoot (36-point) Gun Milan score and percentage
whatYouGet.item2: Breakdown of all 8 kootas: Varna, Vashya, Tara, Yoni, Graha Maitri, Gana, Bhakoot, Nadi
whatYouGet.item3: Partner summaries: Nakshatra, Rashi, Varna, Gana, Nadi for each
whatYouGet.item4: Clear interpretation (recommended / acceptable / good / excellent match)
whatYouGet.item5: Based on traditional Vedic astrology marriage compatibility

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Common questions about Gun Milan and matchmaking.
faq.q1: What is Ashtakoot or Gun Milan?
faq.a1: Gun Milan (also called Ashtakoot) is a Vedic astrology method that scores marriage compatibility using 8 factors (kootas) totaling 36 points. It compares the birth charts of both partners, especially Moon nakshatra and sign.
faq.q2: Why is time of birth important for matchmaking?
faq.a2: Time of birth fixes the Moon sign and nakshatra, which drive most of the gun milan rules (Tara, Yoni, Gana, Bhakoot, Nadi). Even a small time difference can change the result.
faq.q3: Can I use saved kundli profiles?
faq.a3: Yes. If you have already added birth details in your kundli profiles, use "Quick fill from saved profiles" and assign a profile to Partner 1 or Partner 2 with one click.
faq.a4: Your birth details and matchmaking results are stored securely and are only accessible to you when you are logged in.

finalCta.title: Ready to check compatibility?
finalCta.subtitle: Enter birth details for both partners above and get your Ashtakoot Gun Milan result.

chartsSection.title: Partner Kundlis
chartsSection.intro: Birth charts (Lagna D-1) for both partners, as used in the Gun Milan compatibility analysis.

result.title: Gun Milan Result
result.interpretBelow18: Below 18 points: Marriage is not recommended as per traditional Ashtakoot matching.
result.interpret18to24: 18–24 points: Average or acceptable match. Some remedies may be suggested by an astrologer.
result.interpret25to32: 25–32 points: Good match. Compatibility is favourable for marriage.
result.interpret33plus: 33–36 points: Excellent match. Highly favourable for marriage.
result.footerBelow18: Ashtakoot matching between the partners is below the commonly cited minimum. This is not considered a favourable score under classical rules.
result.footer18to24: Ashtakoot matching shows an average or acceptable score. Many traditions consider this workable with guidance.
result.footer25to32: Ashtakoot matching shows a good score. Compatibility is broadly favourable for marriage under classical norms.
result.footer33plus: Ashtakoot matching shows an excellent score. Highly favourable under classical Ashtakoot norms.
result.footerScoreSentence: The pair scores {total} out of {max} points.
result.doshaNote: This report focuses on Ashtakoot (36 gunas) only. Manglik (Mangal) dosha and other chart-specific doshas are not evaluated here. For a full marriage compatibility review—including Manglik analysis—consult an astrologer or review each partner’s individual kundli.

varna.meaning: Varna refers to the mental compatibility of the two persons involved. It holds nominal effect in the matters of marriage compatibility.

vashya.area: Innate giving / attraction towards each other
vashya.meaning: Vashya indicates the bride and the groom's tendency to dominate or influence each other in a marriage.

tara.meaning: Tara is the indicator of the birth star compatibility of the bride and the groom. It also indicates the fortune of the couple.

yoni.meaning: Yoni is the indicator of the sexual or physical compatibility between the bride and the groom in question.

grahaMaitri.meaning: Graha Maitri is the indicator of the intellectual and mental connection between the prospective couple.

gana.descBad: Gana mismatch (Rakshasa with Deva/Manushya) is considered inauspicious.
gana.meaning: Gana is the indicator of the behaviour, character and temperament of the potential bride and groom towards each other.

bhakoot.descBad: Partner 2's Moon in {house}th from Partner 1's Moon is inauspicious.
bhakoot.meaning: Bhakoota is related to the couple's joys and sorrows together and assesses the wealth and health after their wedding.

nadi.descBad: Same Nadi is considered inauspicious for health and progeny.
nadi.meaning: Nadi is related to the health compatibility of the couple. Matters of childbirth and progeny are also determined with this Guna.

contact.heroSubtitle: Have questions? We're here to help! Reach out to us and we'll get back to you as soon as possible.
contact.formSubtitle: Fill out the form below and we'll respond within 24 hours
contact.subject: Subject
contact.placeholderMessage: Tell us how we can help you…
contact.getInTouchBody: Whether you have questions about our services, need technical support, or want to provide feedback, we're here to help. Our team is available 24/7 to assist you.
contact.urgentBody: For urgent matters or immediate support, please call us directly or use our live chat feature available on the website.
contact.faq1a: Our reports combine traditional astrological wisdom with detailed analysis, providing highly accurate insights. For critical life decisions, we recommend consulting with our expert astrologers.
contact.faq2q: How do I book a consultation?
contact.faq2a: You can book a consultation directly from our homepage booking form, or navigate to the Services page to choose a specific type of consultation.
contact.faq3a: Absolutely! We use industry-standard encryption to protect all your data. Your birth details and personal information are never shared with third parties.
contact.faq4q: Can I get a refund if I'm not satisfied?
contact.faq4a: Yes, we offer a 30-day money-back guarantee on all our services. If you're not satisfied, contact our support team for a full refund.

about.heroSubtitle: Bridging ancient wisdom with modern technology to help you discover your true potential and navigate life's journey with confidence.
about.missionP1: At AnantAstro, we believe that everyone deserves access to accurate, personalized astrological guidance. Our mission is to make the ancient wisdom of astrology accessible to all through innovative technology and expert consultations.
about.missionP2: We combine traditional Vedic and Western astrological practices with modern technology to provide comprehensive insights into your personality, relationships, career, and life path.
about.missionP3: Whether you're seeking clarity on major life decisions, understanding your relationships better, or exploring your spiritual journey, AnantAstro is here to guide you every step of the way.
about.valuesSubtitle: The principles that guide everything we do
about.v1d: We approach every consultation with empathy and understanding, recognizing the personal nature of astrological guidance.
about.v2d: We maintain the highest standards of accuracy and ethical practice in all our astrological services.
about.v3d: We combine traditional wisdom with modern technology to deliver exceptional insights and reports.
about.v4d: We foster a supportive community where individuals can explore their spiritual journey together.
about.teamSubtitle: Dedicated professionals committed to your astrological journey
about.team1d: Our team consists of verified astrologers with decades of combined experience in Vedic, Western, and modern astrological practices.
about.team2d: Our team works tirelessly to develop tools that enhance traditional astrological interpretations.
about.team3d: Our support team is available 24/7 to assist you with any questions or concerns about our services.
about.w1d: We analyze astrological patterns to provide you with personalized, accurate insights based on traditional methods and expert interpretation.
about.w2d: All our astrologers are verified professionals with years of experience. We ensure quality and authenticity in every consultation.
about.w3d: From career guidance to relationship compatibility, our reports cover all aspects of your life with detailed, actionable insights.
about.w4d: Your personal information and birth data are encrypted and secure. We prioritize your privacy and confidentiality above all else.
about.ctaSubtitle: Join thousands of satisfied users who have discovered clarity and guidance through AnantAstro.
